# CMS Demo

> AI-native content engine

## Pages

- [About](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/about/): 30 years of CMS heritage. 1,000+ websites shipped. One lesson: complexity kills.
- [Om os](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/about-da/): 30 års CMS-arv. 1.000+ websites leveret. Én lektie: kompleksitet dræber.
- [From Static HTML to AI-Powered Content: The History of CMS (1995–2026)](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/blog/history-of-cms/): Content management systems have quietly shaped the web for three decades. From hand-coded HTML files on FTP servers to headless, AI-integrated platforms — here's the full story.
- [Fra statisk HTML til AI-drevet indhold: CMS'ets historie (1995–2026)](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/blog/history-of-cms-da/): Content management systemer har stille formet nettet i tre årtier. Fra håndkodede HTML-filer på FTP-servere til headless, AI-integrerede platforme — her er den fulde historie.
- [Blog — @webhouse/cms](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/blog/): Architecture decisions and development chronicles for @webhouse/cms.
- [The Age of the Agentic CMS Is Here](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/blog/the-agentic-cms/): The CMS landscape is undergoing its biggest shift since WordPress. Here's what's happening — and why we built @webhouse/cms from scratch to meet this moment.
- [Det agentiske CMS' tidsalder er her](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/blog/the-agentic-cms-da/): CMS-landskabet gennemgår sit største skifte siden WordPress. Her er hvad der sker — og hvorfor vi byggede @webhouse/cms fra bunden for at møde dette øjeblik.
- [CMS Chronicle #12: The AI-Native Editor](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/blog/the-ai-native-editor/): 748 commits in 11 days. We shipped a conversational CMS interface, upgraded the richtext editor to TipTap v3, built a media processing pipeline, and discovered a save bug that had been hiding since day one.
- [CMS Krønike #12: Den AI-native editor](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/blog/the-ai-native-editor-da/): 748 commits på 11 dage. Vi leverede en samtalebaseret CMS-grænseflade, opgraderede richtext-editoren til TipTap v3, byggede en mediebehandlings-pipeline og opdagede en gemme-bug der havde gemt sig siden dag ét.
- [Why We're Building This](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/blog/why-we-are-building-this/): A CMS is not a product decision. It's a philosophical one. We've shipped over 1,000 websites. Here's why we're building a new opinionated CMS anyway.
- [Hvorfor vi bygger dette](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/blog/why-we-are-building-this-da/): Et CMS er ikke en produktbeslutning. Det er en filosofisk. Vi har leveret over 1.000 websites. Her er hvorfor vi bygger et nyt meningsfuldt CMS alligevel.
- [About](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/da/about/): 30 years of CMS heritage. 1,000+ websites shipped. One lesson: complexity kills.
- [From Static HTML to AI-Powered Content: The History of CMS (1995–2026)](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/da/blog/history-of-cms/): Content management systems have quietly shaped the web for three decades. From hand-coded HTML files on FTP servers to headless, AI-integrated platforms — here's the full story.
- [Blog — @webhouse/cms](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/da/blog/): Arkitekturbeslutninger og udviklingshistorier for @webhouse/cms.
- [The Age of the Agentic CMS Is Here](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/da/blog/the-agentic-cms/): The CMS landscape is undergoing its biggest shift since WordPress. Here's what's happening — and why we built @webhouse/cms from scratch to meet this moment.
- [CMS Chronicle #12: The AI-Native Editor](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/da/blog/the-ai-native-editor/): 748 commits in 11 days. We shipped a conversational CMS interface, upgraded the richtext editor to TipTap v3, built a media processing pipeline, and discovered a save bug that had been hiding since day one.
- [Why We're Building This](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/da/blog/why-we-are-building-this/): A CMS is not a product decision. It's a philosophical one. We've shipped over 1,000 websites. Here's why we're building a new opinionated CMS anyway.
- [Features](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/da/features/): Everything @webhouse/cms can do — from AI agents to static builds.
- [Forside — @webhouse/cms](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/da/): CMS
- [Quick Start](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/da/quick-start/): Scaffold a new project and have a CMS-powered site running in under 5 minutes.

- [Home — @webhouse/cms](https://cbroberg.github.io/cms-demo-site/cms-demo-site/): The CMS where you describe what you want and get a production-ready site.
